system.effect: The psyker weaves strands of ill fortune around the target, forcing them to re-roll successful tests. The target must re-roll any successful test and accept the second result for the duration of the power.

description.value: The psyker reaches into the skein of fate and twists probability against his foe. For the duration of the power, the target must re-roll any successful test and accept the second result, even if it is worse.
